description: zshlintRule_noShift flags a file containing a standalone shift call
steps: Create a fixture file containing a line with just 'shift'
Source the rule-no-shift.zsh Lib File in a zsh subprocess
Call zshlintRule_noShift with the fixture file path
Assert output contains '90005'

description: zshlintRule_noShift produces no output for a file with no shift usage
steps: Create a fixture file with no shift keyword
Source the rule-no-shift.zsh Lib File in a zsh subprocess
Call zshlintRule_noShift with the fixture file path
Assert output is empty

description: zshlintRule_noShift does not flag shift inside a variable name
steps: Create a fixture file containing a variable named 'shiftKey' or 'leftShift'
Source the rule-no-shift.zsh Lib File in a zsh subprocess
Call zshlintRule_noShift with the fixture file path
Assert output is empty

description: zshlintRule_noShift does not flag shift in a comment
steps: Create a fixture file with '# shift' as a comment line
Source the rule-no-shift.zsh Lib File in a zsh subprocess
Call zshlintRule_noShift with the fixture file path
Assert output is empty

description: Orchestrator merges custom rule output with shellcheck JSON into a single array
steps: Create a fixture file containing a standalone shift call
Run zshlint on the fixture file
Parse the JSON output
Assert the array contains an entry with code 90005

description: Orchestrator returns empty array and exit 0 for a clean file
steps: Create a fixture file with no violations
Run zshlint on the fixture file
Assert output is '[]'
Assert exit code is 0

description: Orchestrator returns exit 1 when custom rule finds a violation
steps: Create a fixture file containing a standalone shift call
Run zshlint on the fixture file
Assert exit code is 1

description: zshlintRule_noGroupedLocals flags 'local a b c' declarations
steps: Create a fixture file containing 'local a b c'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output contains '90001'

description: zshlintRule_noGroupedLocals does not flag single-variable local with flags
steps: Create a fixture file containing 'local -a myArray'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output is empty

description: zshlintRule_localOrReturn flags local assignment chained with ||
steps: Create a fixture file containing 'local foo="$(cmd)" || return 1'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output contains '90002'

description: zshlintRule_localOrReturn does not flag || inside the quoted value
steps: Create a fixture file containing 'local msg="yes || no"'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output is empty

description: zshlintRule_noExternalBasename flags $(basename ...) usage
steps: Create a fixture file containing 'local name="$(basename "$path")"'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output contains '90003'

description: zshlintRule_noExternalBasename does not flag basename in a comment
steps: Create a fixture file containing '# use basename or :t modifier'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output is empty

description: zshlintRule_noWhileRead flags 'while IFS= read -r line' loops
steps: Create a fixture file containing 'while IFS= read -r line; do'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output contains '90004'

description: zshlintRule_noWhileRead does not flag 'while true' without read on same line
steps: Create a fixture file containing 'while true; do'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output is empty

description: zshlintRule_noWhileRead does not flag readlink
steps: Create a fixture file containing 'local target="$(readlink -f "$path")"'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output is empty

description: zshlintRule_singleEqualsInTest flags [[ "$foo" = "bar" ]]
steps: Create a fixture file containing '[[ "$foo" = "bar" ]]'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output contains '90006'

description: zshlintRule_singleEqualsInTest does not flag != <= >= =~
steps: Create a fixture file containing '[[ "$foo" != "bar" ]] && [[ $x =~ pattern ]]'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output is empty

description: zshlintRule_elseSmell flags standalone else on its own line
steps: Create a fixture file containing an if/else/fi block
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output contains '90007'

description: zshlintRule_elseSmell does not flag else in a comment
steps: Create a fixture file containing '# else use return early'
Source the Lib File and call the function
Assert output is empty
